batch_write_contract.rule: Write ALL artifacts in a single batch. This is the ONLY write pass.
batch_write_contract.anti_pattern: Writing one artifact per turn is FORBIDDEN.

analyze: FRs referenced in impact/architecture/design exist in requirements-spec.md
Integration points in architecture match interfaces in interface-spec.md
bug_gather: root-cause-analysis.md hypotheses align with fix-strategy.md approaches
tasks.md file paths match fix-strategy.md files affected

finalization_sequence.description: Run cross-check validation in memory, correct inconsistencies
Issue ALL Write tool calls in a single response
Write meta.json, report artifact summary, emit completion signal as VERY LAST line

analyze.analysis_status_rule: partial becomes analyzed when all domain confirmations accepted

session_record_schema.session_id: unique identifier for the analysis session
session_record_schema.slug: kebab-case name derived from the analysis topic

item_fields.name: topic name
item_fields.overridden: boolean — user overrode the depth recommendation
item_fields.assumptions_count: integer — number of assumptions made for this topic

written_tasks_format.description: The on-screen tasks use traceability.template.json (4-column table). The written tasks.md uses tasks.template.json (structured markdown with phases, categories, and line syntax).

key_differences.on_screen: 4-column pipe-delimited traceability table for visual review
key_differences.written: Structured markdown with required_phases, required_task_categories, and line_syntax for machine parsing
